description: Standard empty-state view; either a custom layout (title/systemImage/description) or a built-in search variant.

systemImage.description: SF Symbol name for the hero icon; ignored when search=true

description.description: Secondary descriptive text; ignored when search=true

search.description: When true, uses the built-in 'No results for <query>' appearance; overrides title/systemImage/description

query.description: Search query text displayed in search variant; settable at runtime via value

materialName.description: (Android only; author as materialName:android) Material Symbol name, the Android stand-in for systemImage

materialWeight.description: (Android only) Material Symbols 'wght' axis, 100..700; defaults to 400

materialFill.description: (Android only) Material Symbols 'FILL' axis, 0..1 (or boolean); defaults to 0

materialGrade.description: (Android only) Material Symbols 'GRAD' axis, -50..200; defaults to 0

materialSize.description: (Android only) explicit hero icon size in sp; defaults to 48

value.description: In search variant: the query string. In title variant: the title string. Settable via setElementValue.
